name: OneDrive Sharing Restrictions Documented
description: Ensures OneDrive sharing settings are restricted and reviewed
query: SELECT id, policy_type, status, last_approved_date FROM policy_documents WHERE policy_type = 'm365_onedrive_sharing' AND (status != 'approved' OR last_approved_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Configure OneDrive sharing restrictions, require authenticated sharing links, and review settings annually.
